issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as missing error handling in the Python example.
The skill file contains verbose sections, including extensive best practices, which may distract from core instructions.

scenarios.name: nodejs-api-gateway-dynamodb
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits several key elements such as the correct handler type, runtime, environment variable, policy, and API paths.
